projects.project_name: Hiring of Manpower for Construction Management - AGRINT - 1 Project
scope_of_work: Service of Project Construction Engineering Managers

rate_details: INR 46500 per man month (1–4 years experience, 6 man months)
INR 67000 per man month (5–9 years experience, 52 man months)
INR 87000 per man month (10–15 years experience, 16 man months)
INR 119000 per man month (15+ years experience, 3 man months)

key_highlights: Contract Purchase Agreement for manpower services
Contract period defined from May 2022 to March 2023

strength_indicators: Large manpower contract with Atul Limited

important_clauses: Payment within 30 days from invoice certification
Working days: 6 days per week
Working hours: 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM
Mobilization within 3–4 weeks after interview
Termination: 30 days notice (15 days for disciplinary cases)
GST applicable at 18%
Billing cycle from 21st to 20th of next month
Contractor to comply with PF, ESIC, Bonus, Leave and statutory requirements
Minimum wages as per Minimum Wages Act 1948
Identity card mandatory for workers
Safety compliance mandatory for all workers
Contractor responsible for accidents and compensation
Contract can be terminated by company at any time
Penalty applicable for non-compliance with PF norms
Penalty applicable for misconduct and safety violations
HSE compliance mandatory including PPE usage
Work permit required before starting any work
Contractor must maintain confidentiality of information
Disputes subject to jurisdiction at Valsad
Arbitration as per Arbitration and Conciliation Act 1996

raw_text.content: Contract Purchase Agreement for hiring manpower for construction management AGRINT-1 project with total contract value INR 55112000 for period 01-May-2022 to 31-Mar-2023.

Contractor must comply with labour laws including PF, ESIC, Minimum Wages Act, maintain registers, ensure worker safety, and follow penalty matrix for non-compliance including fines and possible contract termination.

Contractor must follow safety guidelines including PPE usage, work permit system, hot work safety, working at height safety, crane safety, and accident reporting. Penalties applicable for safety violations.

Prices inclusive of all costs, buyer can withhold payment, GST compliance required, confidentiality mandatory, arbitration under Indian law, jurisdiction at Valsad, termination rights available to buyer.
Contractor confirms acceptance of CPA terms and commits to follow safety guidelines, PPE usage, work permit system, and incident reporting during project execution.
